title: Pine's Peru
description: Adding some new Peruvian themed structures including the El Dorado chamber, with guinea pigs on the way. This project is also in early development and has a noticeable lack of features.
body: Adding some new Peruvian themed structures including the El Dorado chamber, with guinea pigs on the way. This project is also in early development and has a noticeable lack of features. More version support is not planned but is not entirely impossible.
